steps.name: Create Campaign
steps.description: A marketing manager creates a new campaign in the CRM system.

steps.name: Define Audience
steps.description: The marketing manager defines the target audience for the campaign using segmentation tags.
actions: Associate segmentation tags with the campaign.

steps.name: Create Promotions
steps.description: The marketing manager creates promotions to be used in the campaign.
actions: Create promotion records and link them to the campaign.

steps.name: Launch Campaign
steps.description: The campaign is launched, making the promotions active.

steps.name: Sync Promotions to SD/POS
steps.description: The CRM system syncs the active promotions to the Sales & Distribution (SD) and Point of Sale (POS) modules.

steps.name: Track Campaign Performance
steps.description: The system tracks the performance of the campaign by analyzing sales data from the SD and POS modules.
actions: Aggregate sales data for the campaign's promotions.
Calculate ROI and other campaign metrics.

steps.name: Complete Campaign
steps.description: The campaign reaches its end date and is marked as complete.
